title: Court procedures provided a more appropriate means to address access issues in ongoing litigation between complainant and retailer
summary: Declined to Investigate Case Summary #2013-001 An individual and a retailer were involved in ongoing litigation in small claims court. The individual sought access to her personal information, which she stated was related to this litigation and was necessary to support her litigation.
